_export.subject: Able.cz s.r.o.
_export.note: ASSESSED epistemic projection. Derived from the dossier's sourced records; every row lists the record IDs it is computed from. Ordinal scales only; nothing invented.

gaps.expectedDatum: Independent client confirmation of the quantified case-study results (ROI, person-days) — no client-side confirmation found in any pass.

Public-sector grants / EU-cofinanced projects (grant registers, CEDR/SZIF, Hlídač státu API — not queried; the Registr smluv WAS queried 2026-07-18 and returned zero contracts for both IČOs, see CLM-57).
Combined Able+Blackfish headcount as filed (each entity files separately; no headcount line exists in either preserved filing).
gaps.recommendedSource: nezávislé potvrzení od klientů (mimo web Able)

gaps.expectedDatum: Whether Vít Schlesinger's concurrent stake in Ventoux Studio s.r.o. has any operational bearing on Able.cz.
gaps.recommendedSource: Hlídač státu / registr smluv / dotační registry

gaps.expectedDatum: Why Lukáš Oslzla departed Blackfish & Co. in February 2024 (the mirrored Artstay/Blackfish ownership swap — CLM-42/43 — documents WHAT happened; no source states why).
Whether Petr Faraga (and Martin Patrik Faraga) are related to Václav Faraga — plausible per CLM-35, stated nowhere.
gaps.recommendedSource: or.justice.cz — přímý výpis IČO 02474727 (one label s.r.o.)

gaps.expectedDatum: Beneficial ownership of ZenX Capital, a.s. — the register shows Zdeněk Sluka on its správní rada, but its shareholders are not visible in an a.s. register record; who ultimately controls Able.cz's largest stake is unresolved.
The consideration paid for Blackfish and the share-purchase terms (not public; the July 2025 notarial deed in Able.cz's Sbírka listin was not retrieved this pass).
gaps.recommendedSource: média / veřejné prohlášení k odchodu L. Oslzly z Blackfish

gaps.expectedDatum: The signing rule (způsob jednání) is still mirror-sourced only — ARES VR does not expose it; retrieving the official justice.cz výpis PDF would primary-verify it.
gaps.recommendedSource: veřejný zdroj k rodinnému vztahu P. a V. Faragy (nenalezen)

gaps.expectedDatum: Insolvency status (ISIR) — BLOCKED, provider returned HTTP 500 on both attempts (2026-07-17, 2026-07-18); retry needed.
gaps.recommendedSource: přímý or.justice.cz fetch (nahradit aggregator mirrors SRC-10/11)

gaps.expectedDatum: Whether the media-reported 'Point FM' investment (SRC-22, recovered and preserved 2026-07-18) was executed via 5326G s.r.o. — the Kříž-majority register vehicle — or another route (CLM-56).
Sanctions / PEP screening — not systematically run in any pass; flagged as open, not asserted as clear.
Employee count (filed — not a line item in this rozvaha/výkaz filing)
Consolidated Able+Blackfish combined financials (each entity files separately)
